sections.title: This Act may be cited as the Citizens Economic Short title
sections.body:
Empowerment (Amendment) Act, 2010, and shall be read as one
with the Citizens Economic Empowerment Act, 2006, in this Act Act No. 9 of
referred to as the principal Act.

Amendment 3. The principal Act is amended in section thirty by the deletion
of section 30 of subsection {I) and the substitution therefor of the following
subsection:
(I) The Citizens Economic Empowerment Fund, established
under section twenty-nine,· shall be vested in the
Commission and shall be managed and administered by
the Commission, either by itself, or with such financial
institutions and fund managers as the Commission may
appoint for purposes of the Fund.
Amendment 4. Section thirty-six of the principal Act is amended by the
of section 36 insertion immediately after the words "citizen influenced company"
of a comma and the words "targeted citizen and groups of citizens
or co-operatives".
